By the way, this also indicate that we won't have to be much
keen taking the watches in hand trying to ensure that there is
an error of 30 sec or 20 sec, becoming unnecessarily frustrated
thinking whether the nurse in hospital reported the accurate
time or not. Whatever (approx) time with minor error given
is ok, and we can make the minor adjustments using the
mathematical methods to arrive at a moment that is in tune
with the native, near to the supplied time. But remember when
the error is high, these mathematical methods will become
